op.text: Priya (closest friend from grad school; ceramicist and freelance designer); they signed up for a Tuesday night pottery class together starting in February 2025; approximately two weeks before 2025-04-27, Priya asked Dana to borrow eight thousand dollars for a ceramics studio lease deposit and buildout; Dana said no immediately and 'badly,' citing not mixing money and friendship; Priya went 'very quiet and then very polite'; they have skipped pottery class twice since; Dana described the exchange as delivering 'ten years of friendship a verdict in four seconds' and recognizes the delivery hurt more than the answer itself (as of 2025-04-27)
op.reason: Both items describe the same relationship with Priya; merging captures the full arc from pottery class friendship through the loan conflict in one coherent entry
